games.name: Rocket Riders
games.description: Our new and refreshing take on the Missile Wars genre with new items, missiles and game modes!

games.name: Snowy Skirmish 2
games.description: Our Christmas Event minigame! A quick, fun snowball fight.

games.name: Crafty Cannoneers
games.description: 2 teams of pirates loot Treasure Chests, kill enemies and fire cannons to destroy the enemy ship!

games.name: The Purple
games.description: A fresh, alien spin on the classic game of tag.

games.name: Fossil Frights
games.description: A compressive 10-day challenge where you play as a museum security guard working 5-minute night shifts to complete various tasks around the museum.

games.name: Borderline
games.description: All players must try and stay alive on a grid that always forces you to move.
